title: Anthoxanthum sikkimense
taxonomy: Anthoxanthum sikkimense is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the Sikkim region of the Himalayas. This species belongs to the genus Anthoxanthum, which includes other grass species such as the sweet vernal grass. The classification of A. sikkimense is further detailed as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, order Poales, family Poaceae, genus Anthoxanthum, and species A. sikkimense. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this species.
